section.heading: Transition to private commercial or other sources of credit

content.p: In making or insuring a farm loan under subchapter I or II, the Secretary shall establish a plan and promulgate regulations (including performance criteria) that promote the goal of transitioning borrowers to private commercial credit and other sources of credit in the shortest period of time practicable.

subsection.heading: Coordination
subsection.chapeau: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall integrate and coordinate the transition policy described in subsection (a) with—

paragraph.content: the borrower training program established by section 2006a of this title;
the loan assessment process established by section 2006b of this title;
the supervised credit requirement established by section 2006c of this title;
the market placement program established by section 2006d of this title; and
other appropriate programs and authorities, as determined by the Secretary.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Pub. L. 110–234 and Pub. L. 110–246 enacted identical sections. Pub. L. 110–234 was repealed by section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 1993, Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 345, as added Pub. L. 94–68, § 9, Aug. 5, 1975, 89 Stat. 382; amended Pub. L. 103–437, § 4(a)(7), Nov. 2, 1994, 108 Stat. 4582, related to testimony by Secretary of Agriculture before congressional committees, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 104–127, title VII, § 750, Apr. 4, 1996, 110 Stat. 1129.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Enactment of this section and repeal of Pub. L. 110–234 by Pub. L. 110–246 effective May 22, 2008, the date of enactment of Pub. L. 110–234, see section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246, set out as a note under section 8701 of this title.
